violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food * with bare hands. Employee was grabbing sandwiches for hot beef combos with bare hands.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of fries, cheddar nuggets, and buns were stored on the floor in the walk in freezers. Boxes of meat were stored on the floor in the back walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken floor tile under the counter by the flat grill in the kitchen.
